heading: Repealed. ,Mar. 3, 1933, ch. 202, § 147 Stat. 1428
label: 1490 Repealed. ,Mar. 3, 1933, ch. 202, § 147 Stat. 1428
notes: Section, R.S. § 1891, related to application of United States Constitution and laws to all organized Territories and in every Territory subsequently organized. Insofar as Territories of Alaska and Hawaii are concerned, it is covered by sections 23 and 495 of this title.
